Captain Dreadnought.name: Captain Dreadnought
Captain Dreadnought.equipped_with: A Captain Dreadnought is equipped with: Dreadnought close combat weapon; Heavy flamer.

option_groups.header: Must pick one weapon from this list

choices.name: Dreadnought close combat weapon with Heavy flamer
Dreadnought close combat weapon with Storm bolter

option_groups.header: May swap the Heavy flamer
Only one Captain or Captain Dreadnought per army.

abilities: Combat Tactics: The Captain Dreadnought can assign 2 free Veteran abilities to himself and a friendly unit at the start of the deployment. Both units must be able to gain the Veteran ability and it must be the same ability. It does not count against the limit on how many Veteran abilities a unit can have.
Furioso: If the model has two melee weapons, it gains +2 attacks.
Refractor field: The model receives a 5+ invulnerability save.

Chaplain.name: Chaplain
Chaplain.equipped_with: A Chaplain is equipped with: Crozius Arcanum; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: One Chaplain per army can be upgraded to a Master of Sanctity for +15 points.
Only one Master of Sanctity or Chaplain Dreadnought per army.

abilities: They Shall Know No Fear
Faithful: Can recite 1 prayer per round. A prayer is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. Knows all prayers of a selected list.
Master of Sanctity: A Master of Sanctity may recite 1 additional prayer per turn.
Rosarius: The model receives a 4+ invulnerability save.

Chaplain Dreadnought.name: Chaplain Dreadnought
Chaplain Dreadnought.equipped_with: A Chaplain Dreadnought is equipped with: Dreadnought close combat weapon; Heavy flamer.

option_groups.header: Must pick one weapon from this list

choices.name: Dreadnought close combat weapon with Heavy flamer
Dreadnought close combat weapon with Storm bolter

option_groups.header: May swap the Heavy flamer
Only one Master of Sanctity or Chaplain Dreadnought per army.

abilities: Faithful: Can recite 2 prayers per round. A prayer is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. Knows all prayers of a selected list.
Furioso: If the model has two melee weapons, it gains +2 attacks.
Reliquary: The model receives a 5+ invulnerability save.

Emperor's Champion.name: Emperor's Champion
Emperor's Champion.equipped_with: An Emperor's Champion is equipped with: The Black Sword; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: An army may only contain 1 Emperor's Champion. He also counts as a Chapter champion.

abilities: They Shall Know No Fear
The Armor of Faith: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

Honor or Death: At the start of the activation, if an enemy HQ or Character is within 12", the placed Order is converted to "Charge". The Emperor's Champion and an attached unit must use the Order to engage in close combat with the enemy HQ or character model.
Martial superiority: The model can re-roll 1 to hit and 1 to wound roll.
Oath: Choose an oath to start the first round of combat. The effects are active throughout the game for all of your Space Marine creatures (=> no vehicles) from the same army organization plan.
Abhor the Witch: All units gain the trait “Aegis(5+)”. The army is not allowed to include psykers.

Accept any Challenge: All units receive +1 to their Strength and Leadership. At the start of every activation, if an enemy unit is within 12", the placed order is converted to "Charge". The order must be used to engage in close combat with at least one enemy unit. Units must always pursue the opponent and are not allowed to flee voluntarily.
Uphold the Honour of the Emperor: All units gain +1 to their armor saves against ranged attacks. Units can never benefit from cover.

Librarian.name: Librarian
Librarian.equipped_with: A Librarian is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: One Librarian per army can be upgraded to a Chief Librarian for +15 points.
Only one Chief Librarian or Librarian Dreadnought per army.

abilities: They Shall Know No Fear
Chief Librarian: The model can cast and deny 1 additional power per battle round.
Psychic hood: Add +1 to rolls to deny enemy psychic powers.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Librarian Dreadnought.name: Librarian Dreadnought
Librarian Dreadnought.equipped_with: A Librarian Dreadnought is equipped with: Dreadnought close combat weapon; Furioso psy halberd; Heavy flamer.

option_groups.header: May swap the Heavy flamer
Only one Chief Librarian or Librarian Dreadnought per army.

abilities: Psionic shield: The model receives a 5+ invulnerability save.
Psychic hood: Add +1 to rolls to deny enemy psychic powers.
Psyker: The model can cast 2 power and deny 2 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Lieutenant.name: Lieutenant
Lieutenant.equipped_with: A Lieutenant is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: One Lieutenant per army can be upgraded to a Captain for +15 points.

abilities: They Shall Know No Fear

Combat Tactics: The Lieutenant can assign a free Veteran ability to himself and a friendly unit at the start of the deployment. Both units must be able to gain the Veteran ability and it must be the same ability. It does not count against the limit on how many Veteran abilities a unit can have.
Captain: A Captain may use Combat Tactics a second time.

option_groups.header: All Neophytes may swap their Astartes chainsword

abilities: Combat squads, They Shall Know No Fear

Infiltrator Squad.name: Infiltrator Squad
Infiltrator Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt carbine; Bolt pistol; Combat knife; Frag grenades; Krak grenades; Smoke grenades.

option_groups.header: For each 5 models, the unit may pick any or all of this
For each 5 models, one Infiltrator Marine may be upgraded to a Helix Adept for +5 points.
The Infiltrator Sergeant may be upgraded to a Veteran Infiltrator Sergeant for +10 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Infiltrator, Move through cover, They Shall Know No Fear

Helix Adept: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.

Haywire mine: Once per battle, this unit can place an Haywire mine while moving. This must be placed within 1" of the unit and more than 3" away from enemy units. The first enemy unit that come within 3" of the Haywire mine suffers 1D3+1 wounds with Strength: 4, AP: -4, D: 1. Vehicles suffer 1D3 glancing hits.

Smoke grenades: The unit can use its Smoke grenades once per game:
- During normal activation.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit.
The unit gains the "Deflect" ability.

Omni scrambler: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

abilities: Combat squads, They Shall Know No Fear
Grenade launcher: Grenades carried by the model gain a range of 24".

abilities: Combat squads, They Shall Know No Fear
Upgrades:
Bladeguard: The model gains the "Warded" ability. Only for Infantry.
Inner Circle: Enemy units that are fleeing from close combat and get caught receive double the amount of automatic hits from this model.
Sanguine Guard: The model rolls 1D6 less for scatter, when it is deployed via the rules for Deep Strike.
Sternguard: The model may shoot "Rapid Fire" weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" command and reduces its total penalty to hit rolls in ranged combat by -1, down to a minimum of 0.
Sword Brethren: The model gains the "Deadly(5+)" ability for melee attacks.
Vanguard: The model gains +1" range for charge moves.
Wolf Guard: The model gains the "Bodyguard", "Command squad" and "Squadron" abilities. The model gains the "Character" unit type.

Blessing of the Omnissiah: At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a wound or armor penetration roll.
Master of the Forge: A Master of the Forge may use "Blessing of the Omnissiah" two times per battle round. Additionally, he counts as a HQ selections and fills up a slot, respectively.

abilities: Deep Strike

Control Jets: The unit must land at least 6" away from other units (friendly or enemy) and can never stray closer than 1" to another unit, terrain, or the edge of the field. Reduce the deviation only enough to place the model.
Drop Pod Assault: Drop Pods always start the game as reserves and are always set up via Deep Strike. Even if the played mission does not allow reinforcements and/or Deep Strike!
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models or 1 Dreadnought.
Unmanned: A Drop Pod cannot contest or hold mission objectives.

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(1), Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialisᴳ
equipment.desc: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game. Unique

equipment.name: Armorium cherubᴳ
equipment.desc: The model or the attached unit can fire a weapon twice during one activation. Each unit can benefit from this effect only once per round. Ammo(1).

equipment.name: Astartes bionicsᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Warded" ability.

equipment.name: Auspex scannerᴳ
equipment.desc: If the unit has not already activated this turn, it may immediately use up its order and fire at an enemy unit within 18" that is deployed as reinforcement as if it had been given the "Stand & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.

equipment.name: Auxiliary grenade launcherᴳ
equipment.desc: All grenades of the model have four times the range.

equipment.name: Book of Malcadorᴳ
equipment.desc: The model knows one more psychic power from any psychic discipline it normally has access to. Unique. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: Chapter banner
equipment.desc: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Leadership and Combat resolutions. As long as the banner bearer is alive, Mission objectives that are held by this unit can not be contested by enemy units. Additionally, all models in the unit gain +1 Attack. Unique. Only for Ancients.

equipment.name: Familiarᴳ
equipment.desc: The model may sacrifice the Familiar to reroll a psychic power manifestation test. While it is alive, the model gains +1 Initiative. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: Gravis armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, a 6+ invulnerability save and the special rules "Massive(1)" and "Unyielding". Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Iron haloᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Jump packᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement and the "Jump pack" rule. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Marksman honoursᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic Skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armorᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save. Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the ability "Master-crafted".

equipment.name: Omniscopeᴳ
equipment.desc: The bearer and their attached unit gain the "Seeking" ability against enemy units within 12".

equipment.name: Parry shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Parry".

equipment.name: Phobos armor
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Move Through Cover" and "Infiltrator." Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Purity sealᴳ
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Refractor fieldᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Relic bladeᴳ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains +1 Damage. The point cost for this equipment is the same as for the weapon that it enhances. Can only be used on weapons with D:1. Only for Lieutenants.

equipment.name: Relic of the Chapterᴳ
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Selfless healer
equipment.desc: At the end of its movement, the model can attempt to heal a creature within 3". On a 4+, a model regains up to 1 lost Wound. Only for Apothecaries. Unique.

equipment.name: Signumᴳ
equipment.desc: Instead of using their own ranged weapons, the model may grant a friendly creature model within 6" range +1 to hit rolls this round.

equipment.name: Space Marine bike
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a Twin bolt rifle, the "Bike" type, and "Devastating Charge" (see Outrider Squads). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry". Only for Infantry and Jump pack units.

equipment.name: Swordsman honoursᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beaconᴳ
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep Strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Terminator armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, 2+ armor save, 5+ invulnerable save, and the abilities "Massive(1)", "Deep Strike" and "Unyielding." Only for infantry. Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Trophyᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Counter-attack
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Counter-attack".

equipment.name: Favoured enemy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

equipment.name: Furious charge
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

equipment.name: Infiltrator
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Infiltrator".

equipment.name: Outflank
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Outflank".

equipment.name: Tank hunter
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

equipment.name: Terrain expert
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

equipment.name: Vanguard
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Vanguard".

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Hunter-killer missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Machine spirit
equipment.desc: If the model is under the effect of "Crew shaken", it may fire one weapon at BS 3+.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Quick(+2), Can only be used with a Charge order.

equipment.name: Banner of the Eagleᴳ
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gain +1 Strength. Ancients only. Unique.

equipment.name: Cyber-Eagle Helmᴳ
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit does not suffer the To Hit penalty for Defensive Fire.

equipment.name: Hunter's Eyeᴳ
equipment.desc: All ranged attacks by this model and its attached unit have the Seeking ability. Unique

equipment.name: Mantle of the Stormseerᴳ
equipment.desc: This model gains +1 to manifest and deny psychic powers. Unique.

equipment.name: Plume of the Plainsrunner
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gain the cumulative Frenzy(1") and Haste(1") abilities. Unique.

equipment.name: Stormwrath Boltsᴳ
equipment.desc: When firing a bolt weapon, this model may choose to fire a Stormwrath bolt instead of attacking normally. Use their bolt weapon's range and the profile above.

equipment.name: Wrath of the Heavens
equipment.desc: This model gains the "Jetbike" type. Bike only. Unique

equipment.name: I.O.Uᴳ
equipment.desc: Select one weapon or equipment item from the (Legacy) Armory of any other army. The selected item can not be enhanced by any other equipment (f.e. with the "Relic of the Chapter" item). Wargear that got the same description or ability like an item from the Space Marine armory can't be taken. If the chosen item has a rule that states that it is "only for xy", this rule may be ignored. The item has to be physically represented on your character model. Unique.

weapons.name: Holy Orbᴳ
weapons.abilities: Ammunition(1), AT(2), Explosive, Haywire, Poison(2+), Unique

equipment.name: Ancient breviaryᴳ
equipment.desc: If the model attempts to use a prayer, the roll is automatically successful.

equipment.name: Cacodominus skullᴳ
equipment.desc: The model can dispel 1 psychic power per battle round like a psyker.

equipment.name: Cenobite servitorᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1" Movement and the "Blind Rage" ability.

equipment.name: Crusade of Wrathᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1 Strength. Unique.

equipment.name: Crusader sealsᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit can reposition up to 6" after a close combat.

equipment.name: Holy relicᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit receive a +5 bonus to all combat results and the "Fearless" ability while engaged in melee. Unique.

equipment.name: Indomitable Willᴳ
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated. 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Noctilith weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Righteous Furyᴳ
equipment.desc: If the model or its attached unit suffers a wound loss in ranged combat, all models gain +1 attack, as well as the "Counter-attack" and "Furious Charge" abilities until the end of the current battle round.

equipment.name: Blessed hull
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a -1 penalty to casting psychic powers.

equipment.name: Auric Aquilaᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Additionally, once per game, the model may gain a 3+ invulnerability save until the start of its next activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Bone of Osrakᴳ
equipment.desc: The models gains +1 to all tests for manifesting a psychic power from the Geokinesis discipline.

equipment.name: Gatebreaker boltsᴳ
equipment.desc: One Bolt weapon of the model gains a -1 bonus to its AP and the "Explosive" ability.

equipment.name: Marksman pistolᴳ
equipment.desc: One Pistol type weapon of the model gains the "Seeking" ability.

equipment.name: The Angel of Sacrificeᴳ
equipment.desc: If the model loses its last Wound, it is only removed after the last possible activation of the owning player (for the current battle round) and can perform all valid actions until then. During this time, the model gains the "Fearless" ability. Unique. Only for Chaplains.

equipment.name: The Banner of Stagandaᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Blind Rage" and "Counter-Attack" abilities. Only for Ancients.

equipment.name: The Eye of Hypnothᴳ
equipment.desc: Select one enemy unit within 18" during your activation. The target suffers a -1 penalty to its armor save or to its AV until the start of the model's next activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Warden's Cuirassᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Wound.

equipment.name: Brazier of Judgementᴳ
equipment.desc: The model automatically succeeds at pursuit rolls to catch fleeing units.

equipment.name: Conversion fieldᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. If it makes at least one successfull save during its activation, to hit rolls against the model suffer a cumulative -1 penalty until the start of its next activation.

equipment.name: Eye of the Unseenᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Favoured Enemy" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Foe-smiterᴳ
equipment.desc: One ranged weapon of the model gains the "Shred" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Heavenfall bladeᴳ
equipment.desc:
One melee weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Monster Slayerᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Tank hunter" ability.

equipment.name: Shroud of Heroesᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Stealth" ability, while it is not attached to a unit. Unique.

equipment.name: Watchers in the Darkᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Aegis(4+)" ability.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep Strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Angelsteel weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the "Life curse" ability.

equipment.name: Aura of Fervorᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1 Attack until the end of the current battle round, when they perform a Charge command.

equipment.name: Avenging Angelᴳ
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll 1 to hit and 1 to wound roll each activation for each friendly unit that has been killed during the game.

equipment.name: Black Rage
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack and the "Blind Rage" and "Furious Charge" abilities. It can only join units with the "Blind Rage" ability.

equipment.name: Chalice of Bloodᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and an attached unit receive a +1 bonus to melee hit rolls. The model also receives an additional +1 Initiative. Unique. Only for Apothecaries.

equipment.name: Death mask
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Terrifying(-2)" ability .

equipment.name: Executionerᴳ
equipment.desc: The model may choose to make some or all melee attacks at Initiative 1, but gains +1 Damage for these attacks.

equipment.name: Gleaming Pinions
equipment.desc: The model rolls 1D6 less for scatter, when it is deployed via the rules for Deep Strike.

equipment.name: Lord of Deathᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Strength and +1 Toughness. If you pass a Leadership test during your activation, all melee attacks against one single enemy model in direct base contact may re-roll all to hit rolls. Unique. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: Overcharged engine
equipment.desc: Instead of shooting, a vehicle can move an additional 1d6". At the end of the additional movement, the vehicle must make a difficult terrain test. The additional movement does not count towards the distance the vehicle has moved in relation to passenger orders.

weapons.name: Sword of St. Aquitaineᴳ
weapons.abilities: Force Weapon. Unique. The model and its attached unit can't be targeted by anything outside of 18".

equipment.name: Book of Painᴳ
equipment.desc: Select one enemy unit during your activation. The target must pass a Leadership test or gain one Battleshock token. Unique.

equipment.name: Grimoire Pandaemonicaᴳ
equipment.desc: Once per battle round, you may re-roll both scatter dice from ANY player. Unique.

equipment.name: Shard of the Monolithᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Strength and +1 Initiative. It may never use a "Stand & Shoot" order voluntarily and must always move closer to the nearest enemy unit, if possible.

equipment.name: Baneboltsᴳ
equipment.desc: One ranged weapon of the model gains the "Deadly(5+)" ability.

equipment.name: Clavisᴳ
equipment.desc:
Roll 1D3 during activation if an enemy vehicle is within 6":
        1 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit with AT(1).
        2 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit with AT(2).
        3 - The vehicle suffers a penetrating hit with AT(3).

equipment.name: Deathwatch homing beaconᴳ
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 6" of the bearer via Deep Strike does not scatter.

equipment.name: Digital weaponsᴳ
equipment.desc: The model can make one additional melee attack per round. Strength: 2 AP: -4 Damage: 1. Hits wound automatically.

equipment.name: Phase weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains the "Shield breaker(-1)" ability.

equipment.name: Special ammunitionᴳ
equipment.desc:
All Bolt weapons of the model can receive one of the following benefits during each activation:
- Poison(3+)
- Sunder(2)
- +6" range and -1 AP
Combi-weapons may use this ammunition with the "Bolt" part of their profile.

equipment.name: The Tome of Ectocladesᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit may select a single Veteran ability during each Rally phase to be active for the current battle round. Unique.

equipment.name: Auspex array
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain the "Anti-Air" ability.

equipment.name: Frost weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: A melee weapon of the model gains +1 Strength.

equipment.name: Healing balmᴳ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Narthecium" ability. Only for Chaplains.

equipment.name: Pelt of the Doublegangrelᴳ
equipment.desc: A single enemy model in direct base contact suffers a cumulative -1 to hit penalty against the model.

equipment.name: Rune weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: The model receives a +1 bonus to dispel psychic powers.

equipment.name: Tempest weaponᴳ
equipment.desc: Enemy models that suffer at least one wound from this weapon must pass a Strength test or reduce their Initiative to 1 until the end of their next activation.

equipment.name: Thunderwolf mount
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement, +1 Strength, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, +1 Attack, and the "Bike" type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Wolf companionᴳ
equipment.desc: The model may be joined by up to four Wolf companions. They do not prevent a model from joining another unit. The datasheet ist at the end of the codex.

equipment.name: Wolf helmetᴳ
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain the "Seeking" ability.

equipment.name: Wolftooth necklaceᴳ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Aegis(5+)" ability.

equipment.name: Blizzard shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry". Counts as a weapon selection. Only for Captain Dreadnoughts, Chaplain Dreadnoughts and Dreadnoughts.

archetypes.name: 1st Company
archetypes.desc:
The army may only consist of the following units:
- 1x Captain Dreadnought or 1x Lieutenant, 1x Chaplain or 1x Chaplain Dreadnought, 1x Emperor's Champion, 1x Librarian or 1x Librarian Dreadnought
- 1x Ancient, 1x Apothecary, Deathwing Knights, Dreadnoughts (including variants), Honor Guard, 1x Judiciar, 1x Company Champion, Terminators, 1x Techmarine
- Land Raider (including variants), Repulsor (including variants)
- Drop Pods
- HQ models must gain their "once per army" upgrade, if possible.
- Honor Guard and Terminators can be taken as Troops.
- Honor Guard units are not limited to 1x per HQ selection anymore.
- All units gain the special rule "Objective secured!".

archetypes.name: Death from Above
archetypes.desc:
- Assault Squad units can be taken as Troops.
- Only Assault Squad units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.
- At least half of all Assault Squad models must start the game in reserves, even if the mission does not allow reserves.

archetypes.name: Drop Pod Assault
archetypes.desc:
- All units must start the game as passengers inside a Drop Pod.
- Half of all Drop Pods in the army (round up) arrive automatically in the first battle round as reinforcements. The other half arrives automatically in the second battle round.

archetypes.name: Forlorn Brothers
archetypes.desc:
The army may only consist of the following units:
- Creature units with the "Black Rage" equipment (see Blood Angels Armory).
- Dreadnoughts, Redemptor Dreadnoughts.
- Drop Pods, Impulsors, Razorbacks, Rhinos. 
- Death Company units can be taken as Troops and are not limited to one per army anymore.

archetypes.name: Legion
archetypes.desc:
- The army has access to everything from the Horus Heresy Space Marines supplement.
- Only Troops from the Horus Heresy Space Marine Supplement count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Librarian Conclave
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets 4 HQ slots in total and has only access to Librarians, Chief Librarians and Librarian Dreadnoughts as HQ models. Librarians gain the "Command Squad" ability.
- All of these models must be set up within 12" of each other. 
- While a Chief Librarian is within 12" of a Librarian, they can manifest all powers known to the Librarian and receive a +1 bonus to manifesting and dispelling psychic powers.

archetypes.name: Renegades
archetypes.desc:
- Renegades are treated like "Chaos Space Marines" in the Ally matrix.
- May select one Trait from the "Chaos Space Marines" list instead of the normal selection.

archetypes.name: Swift as the Wind
archetypes.desc:
- Bikes and Outriders can be taken as Troops.
- Outflanking units may be deployed on turn 1.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: Legacy of Aurelia
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Blood Ravens Armory.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Alien Hunters
legacies.desc:
The army has access to the Death Watch Armory, Inquisitors and Inquisition units. Inquisitors must select "Ordo Xenos" in the armory.
Each model can receive the "Special ammunition" equipment, regardless of whether it has access to the armory.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Angel
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Blood Angels Armory and the Sanguine psychic discipline.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Crusader
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Black Templars Armory and Prayers of the Faithful.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Damned
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Relictors Armory.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Khan
legacies.desc: The army has access to the White Scars Armory and the Stormspeaking psychic discipline.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Lion
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Dark Angels Armory and the Interromancy psychic discipline.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Praetorian
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Imperial Fists Armory and the Geokinesis psychic discipline.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Wolf
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Space Wolves Armory and the Tempestus psychic discipline.

traits.name: Blitz Attack
traits.desc: The unit can fire Assault weapons, Grenades and Pistols without a to hit penalty with Advance and Charge orders.

traits.name: Bolter Drill
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Bolt weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

traits.name: Expanded Armory
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Cursed Founding
traits.desc:
Select one improvement that must be applied to any creature unit:
- Apparitions: The unit gains the "Deep Strike" ability and must use it during the DEPLOYMENT PHASE instead of being set up as normal. It can deep strike anywhere that isn't the enemy's deployment zone, but can scatter into it. Additionally, the unit gains the "Warded" ability.
- Aura of Doom: The unit gains the "Terrifying(-2)" ability.
- Berserkers: The unit gains the "Blind Rage" ability.
- Immolation: The model gains the "Retribution(1)" ability.
- Ossific Blades: The model gains the "Ossific Blades" weapon. (See Armory).

traits.name: Forged in Battle
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Knowledge is Power
traits.desc: The model can re-roll one psychic test per activation. Only for Psykers.

traits.name: Path of Damnation
traits.desc: One model of the army must gain the "Demon weapon" equipment from the "Chaos Space Marines" codex to enhance one of its weapons (chosen from the Space Marine codex). The Demon weapon ability can be from any Armory.

traits.name: Purity above All
traits.desc: One non-character model per squad with access to gear from the Armory can be upgraded to an Apothecary and gains the "Narthecium" ability.

traits.name: Red Thirst
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Siege Experts
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Sons of Mars
traits.desc: One non-character model per squad with access to gear from the Armory can be upgraded to a Techmarine and gains the "Blessing of the Omnissiah" ability.

traits.name: Stalwart
traits.desc: The unit can reroll one armor save per battle round.

traits.name: Stoic
traits.desc: The unit does not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.

traits.name: Strike from the Shadows
traits.desc: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: The Flesh is Weak
traits.desc: Creature models gain a 6+ invulnerability save. Vehicles repair either one Engine Damage or Weapon Damage on themselves during each Rally phase. Only for creature models that do not already have an invulnerability save from their datasheet or Armory.

traits.name: Unleashed Hunters
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

General.name: Smite
General.effect: The target suffers three automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Seeking.

Librarius.name: Psionic Scourge
Librarius.effect: Roll 1D6 and add the caster's Ld score. The target suffers one automatic wound for each point of difference to its own Ld value. Seeking.

Librarius.name: Fury of the Ancients
Librarius.effect: The target suffers five hits with Strength: 6 AP: -2 D: 1; Seeking.

Librarius.name: Power of Heroes
Librarius.effect: The target gains +2 Strength and +2 Attacks.

Librarius.name: Psionic Fortress
Librarius.effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Librarius.name: Null Zone
Librarius.effect: All enemy units in range lose their invulnerability saving throw. Psychic test results from enemy units are halved.

Biomancy.name: Bleed
Biomancy.effect: Roll 1D6 per model of the target unit. For every 4+, it suffers an automatic wound with Strength: 4 AP: 0 D: 1; Seeking.

Biomancy.name: Endurance
Biomancy.effect: The target gains the Berserk(4+) and Move through cover abilities.

Biomancy.name: Life Steal
Biomancy.effect: The target suffers an automatic wound with Strength: 4 AP: -4 D: 1; Seeking. The caster regains one lost Wound.

Biomancy.name: Steeled Body
Biomancy.effect: The target gains +1 Strength, +1 Toughness and +1 to its Saving throw.

Biomancy.name: Weaken
Biomancy.effect: The target suffers -1 to its Strength and is treated as moving through difficult terrain.

Biomancy.name: Unnatural Speed
Biomancy.effect: The target gains +2 Initiative and Frenzy(6").

Divination.name: Psionic Guidance
Divination.effect: In the next Reinforcement phase, one friendly unit appears automatically without having to roll for it.

Divination.name: Perfect Timing
Divination.effect: The target may change the result of a single die roll to any result during their own activation.

Divination.name: Premonition
Divination.effect: The target gains the Counter-attack ability and ignores the penalty for Defensive fire.

Divination.name: Foresight
Divination.effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Divination.name: Misfortune
Divination.effect: All attacks against the target gain the Armor piercing(5+) ability.

Divination.name: Gaze Into The Future
Divination.effect: The target may re-roll all rolls.

Pyromancy.name: Burning Hands
Pyromancy.effect: The target suffers four automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -2 D: 1; Seeking.

Pyromancy.name: Flame Blade
Pyromancy.effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for one melee weapon.

Pyromancy.name: Flame Shield
Pyromancy.effect: All attacks reduce their Strength and AP by 1 against the target.

Pyromancy.name: Inferno
Pyromancy.effect: The terrain piece becomes dangerous terrain.
Pyromancy.duration: Until the end of the game

Pyromancy.name: Magma Beam
Pyromancy.effect: The target suffers one hit with Strength: 8 AP: -5 D: 2; AT(4), Melta, Seeking.

Pyromancy.name: Fireball
Pyromancy.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with Strength: 8 AP: -3 D: 1; AT(2), Barrage, Seeking.

Telekinesis.name: Projectile Assault
Telekinesis.effect: Six automatic hits with S:5 AP:-2 D:1; Seeking, Suppression.

Telekinesis.name: Telekinetic Blast
Telekinesis.effect: The target is pushed 1D6 inches away from the caster in a straight line.

Telekinesis.name: Force Field
Telekinesis.effect: The target gains the benefit of cover.

Telekinesis.name: Levitation
Telekinesis.effect: The target gains +6 inches Movement (to a maximum of 12 inches) and the Anti-Grav ability.

Telekinesis.name: Psionic Storm
Telekinesis.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with Strength: 9 AP: -3 D: 1; AT(2), Barrage, Seeking, Suppression.

Telepathy.name: Courage
Telepathy.effect: The target cannot gain Battleshock tokens by any means and loses all current tokens.

Telepathy.name: Damnation
Telepathy.effect: The target suffers a -2 penalty to its Leadership.

Telepathy.name: Shrouding
Telepathy.effect: The target gains the Deflect and Parry abilities.

Telepathy.name: Psychic Shriek
Telepathy.effect: Roll 3D6 and subtract the target's Leadership. If the result is >0, the target suffers 1 Mortal Wound and gains a Battleshock token.

Telepathy.name: Dominate
Telepathy.effect: Select one weapon of the target. It automatically hits one enemy unit of your choice within range with a single attack or shot. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Telepathy.name: Hallucinate
Telepathy.effect: Assign a randomly chosen command face down to the target.

prayers.name: Catechism of Fire
prayers.effect: The target gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee OR ranged weapons.

prayers.name: Focus Recitation
prayers.effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

prayers.name: Litany of Hate
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged OR melee combat.

prayers.name: Mantra of Strength
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for melee attacks.

prayers.name: Fire of Devotion
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged AND melee combat.

prayers.name: Litany of Divine Protection
prayers.effect: The target gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

prayers.name: Oath of Glory
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 Strength, +1 Attack and -1 AP for melee attacks.

prayers.name: Plea of Deliverance
prayers.effect: The target is immune against Maledictions and Witchfires.

prayers.name: Psalm of Remorseless Persecution
prayers.effect: The target gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee AND ranged weapons.
